meta.title: TiDB SCaiLE Europe 2026 | Stockholm, June 4
meta.description: Join TiDB SCaiLE Europe 2026 in Stockholm for distributed SQL innovation, AI-native architecture talks, and networking with engineering leaders.

props.headline: Scaling Data. Accelerating AI. Enabling You.
props.subheadline:
Thursday, 4 June 2026 | Epicenter Stockholm
Join 500+ engineering leaders, architects, and innovators for the premier European event on distributed SQL and AI-native database architecture.

props.title: Experience the Future of Cloud-Native Data Infrastructure
props.subtitle: Discover real-world solutions, expert insights, and powerful connections

items.title: Real-World Success Stories
items.description: Hear from customers and users who have harnessed the power of TiDB to drive business growth and innovation in production environments

items.title: Expert-Led Deep Dives
items.description: Explore strategies for scaling data infrastructure to meet tomorrow's demands while accelerating AI app builds and time-to-market

items.title: Networking Opportunities
items.description: Connect with TiDB users, engineers, and peers to build relationships and learn from their experiences across distributed systems

props.title: Engineering Leaders Building Tomorrow's AI-Native Applications
props.subtitle: TiDB SCaiLE Europe brings together the teams and decision-makers driving innovation

items.title: Developers & Engineers
items.description: Building applications on distributed or cloud-native databases

items.title: Data & Platform Architects
items.description: Designing infrastructure for scale, resilience, and AI-native workloads

items.title: Engineering Leaders
items.description: Evaluating modern data strategies for next-generation database infrastructure

items.title: Technical Decision-Makers
items.description: Exploring alternatives to legacy database infrastructure and consolidating complexity

props.title: Epicenter Stockholm
props.subtitle: A world-class venue in Sweden's tech capital

items.title: Getting There
items.description: Centrally located in Stockholm's Norrmalm district with easy access by public transport and parking available

props.title: The Distributed SQL Platform Built for Modern Workloads
props.subtitle: At the heart of TiDB SCaiLE is the belief that your data infrastructure shouldn't force you to choose between scale, reliability, and efficiency.

items.title: Elastic Scalability
items.description: Grow your database horizontally without downtime or complexity

items.title: Built-In Resilience
items.description: Multi-region replication, ACID transactions, and automatic failover out of the box

items.title: AI-Native Architecture
items.description: HTAP capabilities enable both transactional and analytical queries on the same data

items.title: Cost Efficiency
items.description: Reduce operational overhead and eliminate the need for multiple specialized databases

props.title: Join us at TiDB SCaiLE Europe 2026
props.subtitle: Reserve your spot today and be part of the conversation shaping the future of cloud-native data infrastructure.
